parityMeta.describes: TrainingDecision V2 controlled-reload parity — rising e1rm trend across recent sessions AND low readiness (recoveryHigh) with no severe flag, no gap, no deload selects sessionIntent='controlled-reload' (AR-5-controlled-reload). Proves conservative-but-productive output: not all exercises collapse to 1 set, no 'strength improving but cut everything' contradiction.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic AppData. Five completed push-a sessions with strictly increasing top weights (rising e1rm trend), most recent 2 days ago (no gap -> phase persisted). todayStatus sleep='差' + energy='低' drives readiness score to ~44 (<50 => level 'low' => recoveryHigh).
